tasks.title: Create tasks.json and plan backup
tasks.description: Create backup files for the solver service implementation plan
tasks.details: Create .taskmaster/tasks/tasks.json with all tasks and .taskmaster/tasks/SOLVER_SERVICE_PLAN.md with the full plan including code examples, configuration format, acceptance logic, and fulfillment automation.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify files exist and contain correct content

tasks.title: Extract signing logic to library
tasks.description: Refactor existing sign_intent.rs binary into reusable library modules
tasks.details: Create solver/src/lib.rs (crate root), solver/src/crypto/signing.rs (sign_intent_hash, get_private_key_from_profile), solver/src/crypto/hash.rs (get_intent_hash). Refactor solver/src/bin/sign_intent.rs to use library functions. Reorganized structure to match verifier pattern with crypto/ module.
tasks.testStrategy: Existing sign_intent binary should work unchanged. Run: cargo run --bin sign_intent -- --help

subtasks.title: Create lib.rs crate root with module declarations
Create signing.rs with sign_intent_hash() and get_private_key_from_profile()
Refactor sign_intent.rs binary to use library functions

tasks.title: Create acceptance module
tasks.description: Implement token validation and acceptance logic for draft intents
tasks.details: Create solver/src/acceptance.rs with DraftIntentData struct, AcceptanceResult enum, TokenPair struct, AcceptanceConfig with token_pairs HashMap, and should_accept_draft(). Uses configurable token pairs and exchange rates instead of hardcoded USD/NATIVE logic.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each acceptance rule: test_token_pair_accept, test_token_pair_reject_unfavorable, test_token_pair_with_exchange_rate_accept, test_unsupported_token_pair_rejected

subtasks.title: Create DraftIntentData struct and AcceptanceResult enum
Create TokenPair struct and AcceptanceConfig with token_pairs HashMap
Implement should_accept_draft() with configurable token pair exchange rates
Add unit tests for acceptance logic

tasks.title: Create verifier client
tasks.description: HTTP client for communicating with the verifier API
tasks.details: Created solver/src/verifier_client.rs with VerifierClient struct using reqwest blocking client. Implemented: poll_pending_drafts() -> GET /draft-intents/pending, submit_signature() -> POST /draft-intent/:id/signature (with FCFS 409 Conflict handling), validate_outflow_fulfillment() -> POST /validate-outflow-fulfillment, get_approvals() -> GET /approvals. All methods handle ApiResponse<T> wrapper format. Added unit tests for API response parsing and struct serialization.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with API response format validation (5 tests passing)

tasks.title: Create configuration module
tasks.description: Configuration structs and TOML template for solver settings
tasks.details: Created solver/src/config.rs with SolverConfig, ServiceConfig, ChainConfig, ConnectedChainConfig (MVM/EVM), AcceptanceConfig, SolverSigningConfig. Implemented SolverConfig::load() from TOML file with validation (duplicate chain IDs, token pair format, exchange rates). Created solver/config/solver.template.toml with all settings including verifier URL, hub/connected chain configs, token pairs, and solver signing config. Added 15 unit tests for validation, token pair conversion, TOML serialization, and file loading.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for config loading and validation (15 tests passing)

subtasks.title: Create config.rs with SolverConfig and nested structs

tasks.title: Create signing service loop
tasks.description: Main signing loop that polls verifier and signs accepted drafts
tasks.details: Created solver/src/service/signing.rs with SigningService struct. Methods: run() - main polling loop, process_draft() - evaluate acceptance and sign if accepted, sign_and_submit() - get hash, sign, submit to verifier, parse_draft_data() - parse JSON draft data. Added comprehensive unit tests (18 tests) for parsing and expiry logic.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for parsing and expiry logic (18 tests passing)

subtasks.title: Create SigningService struct with config and clients
Implement run() - main polling loop with interval

tasks.title: Create main entry point (signing only)
tasks.description: Main binary for running solver signing service
tasks.details: Created solver/src/bin/solver.rs with Args struct (clap), main() function that initializes tracing, loads config, creates SigningService, runs service loop. Updated solver/Cargo.toml with tracing-subscriber dependency.

subtasks.title: Create solver.rs binary with Args and main()

tasks.title: Create chain clients module
tasks.description: Clients for interacting with hub and connected chains
tasks.details: Create solver/src/chains/ module with hub.rs (get_intent_events, fulfill_inflow_intent, fulfill_outflow_intent), connected_mvm.rs (get_escrow_events, transfer_with_intent_id), connected_evm.rs (transfer_with_intent_id for ERC20).
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with mock RPC responses

subtasks.title: Create hub.rs with intent and fulfillment functions
Create connected_mvm.rs with escrow and transfer functions
Create connected_evm.rs with ERC20 transfer functions

tasks.title: Create intent tracker
tasks.description: Tracks signed intents and monitors for their creation on hub chain
tasks.details: Create solver/src/service/tracker.rs with IntentTracker struct. Methods: add_signed_intent(), poll_for_created_intents() - query hub chain for intent creation events, get_pending_intents() - return intents ready for fulfillment. Distinguish inflow vs outflow.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for intent state management

subtasks.title: Create TrackedIntent struct with state enum

tasks.title: Create inflow fulfillment service
tasks.description: Monitors escrow deposits and fulfills inflow intents on hub
tasks.details: Create solver/src/service/inflow.rs with InflowService struct. Methods: poll_for_escrows() - monitor connected chain for escrow deposits matching tracked intents, fulfill_inflow_intent() - call hub chain fulfill_inflow_request_intent, release_escrow() - get verifier approval and call complete_escrow_from_fa.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration test with mock chains and verifier

subtasks.title: Implement poll_for_escrows() using connected chain client

tasks.title: Create outflow fulfillment service
tasks.description: Executes outflow transfers and fulfills hub intents
tasks.details: Create solver/src/service/outflow.rs with OutflowService struct. Methods: execute_connected_transfer() - transfer tokens on connected chain (MVM via transfer_with_intent_id, EVM via ERC20 transfer with intent_id in calldata), get_verifier_approval() - call /validate-outflow-fulfillment, fulfill_outflow_intent() - call hub chain fulfill_outflow_request_intent with verifier signature.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration test with mock chains and verifier

tasks.title: Integrate all services into main loop
tasks.description: Combine signing, tracking, and fulfillment into unified service
tasks.details: Modify solver/src/main.rs to initialize all services and run concurrent loops using tokio: signing loop (poll verifier, sign drafts), tracking loop (monitor hub for intent creation), inflow loop (monitor escrows, fulfill), outflow loop (execute transfers, fulfill).
tasks.testStrategy: Full integration test with all services running

subtasks.title: Update main.rs to initialize all services
Implement concurrent loop execution with tokio::select

tasks.title: Update E2E tests to use solver service
tasks.description: Update shell scripts to run solver as a background service
tasks.details: Create testing-infra/ci-e2e/start-solver.sh (generate config, build solver, run in background, save PID). Create stop-solver.sh. Update run-tests-*.sh to start/stop solver. Simplify or remove manual signing/fulfillment scripts since solver handles them automatically.
tasks.testStrategy: Run full E2E test suite with solver as service

subtasks.title: Create start-solver.sh with config generation and startup
Update run-tests-*.sh to start/stop solver service
Remove or simplify fulfillment scripts (solver handles)

phase1.name: Signing Service
phase1.description: Core signing loop that polls verifier and signs accepted drafts

phase2.name: Fulfillment Automation
phase2.description: Monitoring and automatic fulfillment of signed intents
